headline: Snap-on to Present at Oppenheimer Industrial Growth Conference
summary: KENOSHA, Wis., April 29, 2026--Snap-on is scheduled to present at the Oppenheimer Industrial Growth Conference on Wednesday, May 6, 2026 at 1:30 p.m. ET.
